items.name: Apex Drive
items.desc_en: Our flagship daily complex for energy, drive and everyday confidence — built around clinically-loved botanicals.
items.desc_zh: 招牌每日复合配方,主打精力、状态与日常自信,围绕经过验证的植物活性成分打造。
items.long_en: Apex Drive is our flagship daily men's vitality complex. It combines standardized Maca, Tongkat Ali and L-Arginine with Zinc and Vitamin D3 to support natural energy, stamina and a healthy sense of drive. Designed as a simple two-capsule daily ritual, it's the easiest way to start — and our most popular subscription.
items.long_zh: Apex Drive 是我们的招牌男性每日活力复合配方,把标准化玛咖、东革阿里、L-精氨酸与锌、维生素 D3 结合在一起,帮助维持自然的精力、耐力与健康状态。每天两粒,简单成习惯——也是我们最受欢迎的订阅款。
items.actives_en: Maca · Tongkat Ali · L-Arginine · Zinc · D3
items.actives_zh: 玛咖 · 东革阿里 · L-精氨酸 · 锌 · D3

items.name: Iron Surge
items.desc_en: Nitric-oxide support with L-Arginine and L-Citrulline for blood flow, pumps and stamina.
items.desc_zh: L-精氨酸 + L-瓜氨酸的一氧化氮支持,助力血流、泵感与耐力。
items.long_en: Iron Surge pairs L-Arginine and L-Citrulline to support healthy nitric-oxide production and blood flow. A favourite before training or date night for that extra pump and lasting stamina.
items.long_zh: Iron Surge 将 L-精氨酸与 L-瓜氨酸搭配,支持健康的一氧化氮生成与血流。无论训练前还是约会前,都能带来更足的泵感与持久耐力。
items.actives_zh: L-精氨酸 · L-瓜氨酸 · 甜菜根

items.name: Tongkat Pure
items.desc_en: Standardized Tongkat Ali with Fadogia Agrestis for men who want a focused vitality boost.
items.desc_zh: 标准化东革阿里搭配 Fadogia Agrestis,献给追求更集中活力提升的男士。
items.long_en: Tongkat Pure delivers a potent, standardized Tongkat Ali extract alongside Fadogia Agrestis — a popular pairing among men focused on natural vitality, training output and overall drive.
items.long_zh: Tongkat Pure 提供强效、标准化的东革阿里提取物,并搭配 Fadogia Agrestis——是注重自然活力、训练表现与整体状态的男士们的热门组合。

items.name: Maca Energy
items.desc_en: Organic Peruvian Maca with Zinc and Vitamin D — a gentle, everyday foundation for vitality.
items.desc_zh: 有机秘鲁玛咖搭配锌与维生素 D——温和的每日活力基础款。
items.long_en: Maca Energy uses organic black Peruvian Maca with Zinc and Vitamin D3 to support natural energy and mood. Gentle, affordable and a great first step into the routine.
items.long_zh: Maca Energy 采用有机秘鲁黑玛咖,搭配锌与维生素 D3,帮助支持自然精力与状态。温和、平价,是开启日常方案的绝佳第一步。
items.actives_zh: 有机玛咖 · 锌 · 维生素 D3

items.name: Night Recharge
items.desc_en: Ashwagandha and Magnesium to support deep sleep, stress balance and overnight recovery.
items.desc_zh: 南非醉茄(Ashwagandha)与镁,支持深度睡眠、压力平衡与夜间修复。
items.long_en: Vitality starts with recovery. Night Recharge combines KSM-66 Ashwagandha with Magnesium Glycinate to help you wind down, manage stress and wake up restored — the perfect partner to Apex Drive.
items.long_zh: 活力始于修复。Night Recharge 将 KSM-66 南非醉茄与甘氨酸镁结合,帮助你放松、管理压力、醒来焕然一新——是 Apex Drive 的完美搭档。

items.name: Stay Power
items.desc_en: A discreet topical gel for longer-lasting performance and added confidence. Fast, simple, body-safe.
items.desc_zh: 低调的外用凝胶,带来更持久的表现与额外自信。快速、简单、温和不刺激。
items.long_en: Stay Power is a discreet, body-safe topical gel designed to help you last longer with confidence. Fragrance-free and fast-acting, it's our most popular add-on for those wanting an immediate, simple solution alongside the daily routine.
items.long_zh: Stay Power 是一款低调、温和的外用凝胶,帮助你更持久、更有自信。无香、起效快,是想要在日常方案之外获得即时、简单方案的人最受欢迎的连带选择。
